ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account that posted the tweet */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tweet (e.g., brand mention, hashtag) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "retweet_of" INTEGER /* The tweet ID of the original tweet if this is a retweet */,
  "quoted_tweet_id" INTEGER /* The tweet ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* The user ID of the user the tweet is replying to */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* The tweet ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter Web App, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is marked as sensitive */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet might be sensitive */,
  "withheld_in_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the tweet is withheld */,
  "user_follower_count" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has at the time of the tweet */,
  "user_friends_count" INTEGER /* The number of friends (following) the user has at the time of the tweet */,
  "user_verification_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* The location of the user at the time of the tweet */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* The bio of the user at the time of the tweet */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile image */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* The URL of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the brand */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the brand belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the brand */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* The URL of the brand's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The headquarters location of the brand */,
  "twitter_bio" TEXT /* The bio of the brand's Twitter account */,
  "twitter_follower_count" INTEGER /* The number of followers the brand's Twitter account has */,
  "twitter_following_count" INTEGER /* The number of accounts the brand's Twitter account is following */,
  "twitter_verification_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand's Twitter account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* The date and time the user last changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_model_version" TEXT /* The version of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "analysis_timestamp" TEXT /* The date and time the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being measured */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was quoted */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the tweet received */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* The engagement rate of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the hashtag belongs to */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag text */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* The name of the marketing campaign associated with the hashtag */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_hashtags_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_brand_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* The user ID of the user who granted access */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* The date and time access was granted */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* The date and time access was revoked */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_brand_access_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_brand_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_brands" (
  "tweet_brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-brand association */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the tweet is associated with */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is the primary brand mentioned in the tweet */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* The type of mention (e.g., direct mention, hashtag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_brands_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_brands_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)
